action.reasoning: Observation: eval still fails because resolve_base_model_dir cannot find packaged base model from the LoRA checkpoint in isolated workspace, while local scoring works. Analysis: this is a portability/path-resolution bug. The workspace already has checkpoints/baseline/base_model, so we should make base-model discovery robust for both relative and absolute checkpoint paths and smoke-test predict.py exactly the way eval calls it. Decision: patch model.py to search cwd-relative /workspace-relative sibling paths more aggressively, keep local_files_only, and run predict.py with an absolute checkpoint path plus local scoring before resubmitting eval.
